scope: MiMo V2.5 vision runtime source-parity fix for missing qk_channels default

source_fix.previous_vmlx_default: hidden_size / num_heads, 40 for the current 1280 hidden / 32 head bundle

direct_parity_probe.description: Compared upstream Torch MiMoVisionTransformer block0 and vMLX MLX VisionModel block0 with the bundle's real visual.blocks.0 weights and synthetic four-patch input.

verification.pytest: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_mimo_v2_media_runtime.py -k 'vision or jangtq_fast_path_binds_indexed_media_weights or model_splices_image_pixels' -> 7 passed

release_boundary: This fixes a real source-parity default in the MiMo vision skeleton. It does not claim the existing MiMo JANGTQ_2 solid-color visual semantic failures are cleared; those require a fresh live media proof after this patch.
